name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name to tell Congress to protect health care
body:
Our first fight of 2017 **Add your name to stand with Democrats to protect our progress and fight for affordable health care.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem")**
[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c177/4067b0a/236d6c131/7e7908c1/3975763768/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats. **[http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+httpmydemocratsorgProtectHealthCare&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c177/4067b0a/236d6c131/7e7908c8/3975763768/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c177/4067b0a/236d6c131/7e7908c9/3975763768/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c177/4067b0a/236d6c131/7e7908d6/3975763768/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c177/4067b0a/236d6c131/7e7908d7/3975763768/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170105_dnc_rem&source=em_20170105_dnc_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Governor-elect Jim Justice
subject: Inaugural Ball Tickets on Sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for WV
body:
**Justice Inaugural Ball Tickets Now On Sale**
_$75 Individual tickets on sale at_[ _InaugurationWV.com_](https://act.myngp.com/el/3619439020406605824/-9063069238213343232?u=940193704c4b139a9e2c2b870&id=872a4712ae&e=489171a3fe)

The inaugural ball will be begin at 7:30PM at The Greenbrier in White Sulphur Springs, WV. The event is black tie optional and requires tickets.
[**Click here for tickets and more information about the 2017 inaugural ball**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3619439020406605824/-9063069238213343232?u=940193704c4b139a9e2c2b870&id=c1da3ac637&e=489171a3fe)**.**
Entertainment for the evening will include a national headliner, Landau Eugene Murphy, Jr., the Walter Scott Trio, The West Virginia Jazz Orchestra, The Richard Hefner Bluegrass Band, and River Jam.
"Our family is so excited to share this historic evening with the people of West Virginia," **said Dr. Jill Justice, co-chair of the Justice inaugural committee**. "This special event will be a celebration for our great state and the brighter future ahead. Tickets are limited so don't delay; go to the website and get your ticket today."
**Inaugural Ball Details**
**Date:** January 16, 2017
**Time:** 7:30PM
**Location:** The Greenbrier, White Sulphur Springs, WV
**Ticket Price:** $75 per individual
**Dress:** Black Tie Optional

Paid for by Justice for WV
---
Justice for WV
PO Box 40027
Charleston WV 25364 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3619439020406605824/-9135126832251271168).

name: Democrats.org
subject: Tell your health care story
body:
Share your story today.
---
**Democrats are gearing up to protect our progress and fight for affordable health care. Help us today by sharing your story about how the Affordable Care Act has impacted your life.

** **[SHARE MY STORY](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Story1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SHARE+MY+STORY&utm_campaign=em_20170105_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170105_ew_v1s1")**
Friend --

If the Republican Party gets their way, nearly 30 million people will lose their health care coverage.

That's 30 million people who could be placed in a position where they're made to choose between staying current on their medical bills or putting food on the table.

One of those 30 million people could be your cousin, your neighbor, your coworker, or a parent whose child sits next to yours in school every day. One of them could be you.

The fight for affordable care is bigger than politics. It's a fight to say that we won't turn our backs on each other when someone needs us the most. It's a fight about our humanity.

The impact that President Obama's health care reforms have made on people's lives is very real. So we're calling on folks to share their health care stories so Republicans can understand exactly what's at stake when they vote to repeal our progress.

**If you have one, then share your story with us now:**

**[http://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Story](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Story1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+httpmydemocratsorgHealthCareStory&utm_campaign=em_20170105_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170105_ew_v1s1")**

Thank you,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c174/4067b0a/2369fa160/7e79f140/3808662899/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170105_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170105_ew_v1s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c174/4067b0a/2369fa160/7e79f14e/3808662899/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170105_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170105_ew_v1s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c174/4067b0a/2369fa160/7e79f14c/3808662899/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170105_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170105_ew_v1s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c174/4067b0a/2369fa160/7e79f14d/3808662899/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170105_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170105_ew_v1s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Investigate Trump's ties with Russia
body:
Tell Congress: Immediately investigate Trump's ties to Russia (http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Investigate_Trump_Russia_dems/)

Tell Republican Congressional leaders:
"Launch an immediate and public investigation into all of Donald Trump and his cabinet's inappropriate financial ties to the Russian government."

Add your name:

(http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Investigate_Trump_Russia_dems/)

Dear Activist,

(http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Investigate_Trump_Russia_dems/)

Shortly after the election, news broke that U.S. intelligence officials now believe Russian President Vladimir Putin was personally involved in the Russian interference in the presidential election.1 This report follows last week's initial revelation of a secret CIA assessment that Russia intervened in the 2016 U.S. presidential election to help Donald Trump win.2

Trump also nominated Exxon Mobil CEO Rex Tillerson – who has a close relationship with Vladimir Putin and has negotiated oil deals with Russia worth hundreds of billions of dollars – as the next Secretary of State.3

The accumulating evidence is too serious to ignore. There is a very real possibility that Russia helped Trump steal this election from the American people. Some members of the Electoral College are already demanding a briefing on Trump's ties to Russia before being called to vote on Dec. 19, and Republican politicians like Sen. Mitch McConnell and Speaker Paul Ryan have now indicated that they will support an investigation and congressional probe into Russian interference in the U.S. election.4

While that's important, we also need a much broader, immediate and public congressional investigation into the Trump administration's troubling and inappropriate financial ties to the Russian government.

Tell Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and Speaker of the House Paul Ryan: Launch an immediate and public investigation into the relationship between Donald Trump and the Russian government. Click here to sign the petition. (http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Investigate_Trump_Russia_dems/)

When Trump encouraged the Russian government to spy on the United States in July,5 members of the intelligence community – and more than 170,000 CREDO activists – called for him to be denied access to classified national security briefings. The people in power didn't listen.

Republicans in Congress have been relentless in using their power to call sham committee hearings and squander millions of dollars in taxpayer money to set up and run special investigative committees to pursue their extreme right-wing agenda against Planned Parenthood, American Muslims and Hillary Clinton, among others. Now, it is time for them to address an actual controversy. Given the recent revelations about Russia's interference in the U.S. election and the deep concern of the intelligence community and the American public about Trump's ties to Russia, there is no excuse for not launching an investigation now.

Tell Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and Speaker of the House Paul Ryan: Launch an immediate and public investigation into the relationship between Donald Trump and the Russian government. Click here to sign the petition. (http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Investigate_Trump_Russia_dems/)

Republican leaders in Congress must investigate any and all potential Trump connections with Russia to try and recapture the integrity of our elections.Congress can't wait any longer. They must investigate all outstanding concerns related to Trump conspiring with Russia, including:

The reported Russian cyberattacks on Democratic party infrastructure: Congress must look into the extent of Russian intelligence's cyberattacks on the Democratic National Committee, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee and Hillary Clinton's campaign and inquire whether those attacks seemed designed to influence the presidential election.
The reported financial connections between Trump and Russia. Trump's debt load has increased from $350 million to $630 million in just the last year at a time when American banks are reluctant to extend Trump credit.6 In 2008, Trump's son is claimed to have said, "Russians make up a pretty disproportionate cross-section of a lot of our assets. We see a lot of money pouring in from Russia."7 Congress must look into the extent to which Trump's current debt, or his previous business partnerships, obligate him financially to Russian oligarchs aligned with Putin.
Trump advisors' history of working with Putin-aligned politicians. Congress must investigate to what degree Trump's current and past senior advisers, including Paul Manafort and Carter Page – who both have long histories of advising, and collecting enormous profit from, Putin-aligned politicians and oligarchs in Russia and Ukraine – had obligations or ties that might have posed a conflict of interest when they were advising Trump during his presidential campaign .8
Trump's tax returns. Trump refuses to release his tax returns.9 Congress must investigate if there is any information in Trump's tax returns that would indicate previously undisclosed financial ties to Russian interests in close alignment with Putin's dictatorship.
Trump's crony cabinet. Multiple members of or leading candidates for key positions in Trump's crony cabinet have very disturbing ties to Russia. Most notable is Tillerson, who has a strong and intimate history of business dealings with Putin and other Russian government officials.
The Trump campaign's reported meddling with the Republican platform on Ukraine. Congress should look into why – when Trump stayed away from most every aspect of the Republican Party platform – his campaign worked behind the scenes to make sure the party backed away from supporting Ukraine and putting the "official Republican party position on arms for Ukraine ... at odds with almost all the party's national security leaders."10

Republican leaders in Congress are relentless in trying to designate themselves the guardians of our national security, even when their political gamesmanship demonizes and endangers Americans at home and abroad. It would be the height of hypocrisy for them to refuse to investigate the reported CIA intelligence that Russian government interfered with the 2016 presidential election in favor of Donald Trump.

The more of us who add our voices, the harder it will be for McConnell, Ryan and the other leaders in the Republican Party to sweep these reports under the rug and go on with politics as usual. Click the link below to demand they launch an immediate and public investigation into Trump's ties to Russia.

Tell Congress: Immediately investigate Trump's ties to Russia (http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Investigate_Trump_Russia_dems/)

Thank you for speaking out,

Tessa Levine, Campaign Manager
CREDO Action from Working Assets (http://www.credoaction.com)

Add your name:

(http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Investigate_Trump_Russia_dems/)

References

William M. Arkin, Ken Dilanian and Cynthia McFadden, "U.S. Officials: Putin Personally Involved in U.S. Election Hack (http://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/u-s-officials-putin-personally-involved-u-s-election-hack-n696146) ," NBC News, Dec. 15, 2016. Mark Mazzetti and Eric Lichtblau, "C.I.A. Judgment on Russia Built on Swell of Evidence (http://www.nytimes.com/2016/12/11/us/politics/cia-judgment-intelligence-russia-hacking-evidence.html) ," The New York Times, Dec. 11, 2016. Thomas Grove, "Russia Welcomes Idea of Rex Tillerson as Secretary of State (http://www.wsj.com/articles/russia-measured-on-prospect-of-secretary-of-state-tillerson-1481550566) ," The Wall Street Journal, Dec. 12, 2016. Jennifer Steinhauer, "Senate and House Leaders Call for Inquiry of Russian Hacking in Election (http://www.nytimes.com/2016/12/12/us/politics/mcconnell-supports-inquiry-of-russian-hacking-during-election.html?_r=0) ," The New York Times, Dec. 12, 2016. Peter Stone, David Smith, Ben Jacobs, Alec Luhn and Rupert Neate, "Donald Trump and Russia: a web that grows more tangled all the time (https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2016/jul/30/donald-trump-paul-manafort-ukraine-russia-putin-ties) ," The Guardian, July 30, 2016. Josh Marshall, "Trump & Putin. Yes, It's Really a Thing (http://talkingpointsmemo.com/edblog/trump-putin-yes-it-s-really-a-thing) ," TalkingPointsMemo, July 23, 2016. Tom Hamburger, Rosalind Helderman and Michael Birnbaum, "Inside Trump's financial ties to Russia and his unusual flattery of Vladimir Putin. (https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/inside-trumps-financial-ties-to-russia-and-his-unusual-flattery-of-vladimir-putin/2016/06/17/dbdcaac8-31a6-11e6-8ff7-7b6c1998b7a0_story.html?utm_term=.e3a86e7922a6) " The Washington Post, June 17, 2016. Marshall, "Trump & Putin. Yes, It's Really a Thing, (http://talkingpointsmemo.com/edblog/trump-putin-yes-it-s-really-a-thing) ," TalkingPointsMemo, July 23, 2016 and Abigail Tracy, "Trump's Confusing Answer on Crimea Raises Questions About His Campaign Chairman's Alleged Ties to Russia (http://www.vanityfair.com/news/2016/08/donald-trump-paul-manafort-alleged-ties-to-russia-crimea) ," VanityFair.com, August, 1, 2016. Caitlin Macneal, "Manafort: Trump Still Not Going To Release His Tax Returns (http://talkingpointsmemo.com/livewire/trump-tax-returns-russia) ," TalkingPointsMemo, July 27, 2016. Rogin, "Trump campaign guts GOP's anti-Russia stance on Ukraine (https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/global-opinions/trump-campaign-guts-gops-anti-russia-stance-on-ukraine/2016/07/18/98adb3b0-4cf3-11e6-a7d8-13d06b37f256_story.html) ," The Washington Post, July 18, 2016.
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTA2LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvNjM2ODIzNTQ=

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

Now, it is time for them to address an actual controversy. Given the recent revelations about Russia's interference in the U.S. election and the deep concern of the intelligence community and the American public about Trump's ties to Russia, there is no excuse for not launching an investigation now. Tell Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and Speaker of the House Paul Ryan: Launch an immediate and public investigation into the relationship between Donald Trump and the Russian government. Click here to sign the petition. () Republican leaders in Congress must investigate any and all potential Trump connections with Russia to try and recapture the integrity of our elections.Congress can't wait any longer. They must investigate all outstanding concerns related to Trump conspiring with Russia, including: The reported Russian cyberattacks on Democratic party infrastructure: Congress must look into the extent of Russian intelligence's cyberattacks on the Democratic National Committee, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee and Hillary Clinton's campaign and inquire whether those attacks seemed designed to influence the presidential election. The reported financial connections between Trump and Russia. Trump's debt load has increased from $350 million to $630 million in just the last year at a time when American banks are reluctant to extend Trump credit.6 In 2008, Trump's son is claimed to have said, "Russians make up a pretty disproportionate cross-section of a lot of our assets. We see a lot of money pouring in from Russia."7 Congress must look into the extent to which Trump's current debt, or his previous business partnerships, obligate him financially to Russian oligarchs aligned with Putin. Trump advisors' history of working with Putin-aligned politicians. Congress must investigate to what degree Trump's current and past senior advisers, including Paul Manafort and Carter Page – who both have long histories of advising, and collecting enormous profit from, Putin-aligned politicians and oligarchs in Russia and Ukraine – had obligations or ties that might have posed a conflict of interest when they were advising Trump during his presidential campaign .8 Trump's tax returns. Trump refuses to release his tax returns.9 Congress must investigate if there is any information in Trump's tax returns that would indicate previously undisclosed financial ties to Russian interests in close alignment with Putin's dictatorship. Trump's crony cabinet. Multiple members of or leading candidates for key positions in Trump's crony cabinet have very disturbing ties to Russia. Most notable is Tillerson, who has a strong and intimate history of business dealings with Putin and other Russian government officials. The Trump campaign's reported meddling with the Republican platform on Ukraine. Congress should look into why – when Trump stayed away from most every aspect of the Republican Party platform – his campaign worked behind the scenes to make sure the party backed away from supporting Ukraine and putting the "official Republican party position on arms for Ukraine ... at odds with almost all the party's national security leaders."10 Republican leaders in Congress are relentless in trying to designate themselves the guardians of our national security, even when their political gamesmanship demonizes and endangers Americans at home and abroad. It would be the height of hypocrisy for them to refuse to investigate the reported CIA intelligence that Russian government interfered with the 2016 presidential election in favor of Donald Trump. The more of us who add our voices, the harder it will be for McConnell, Ryan and the other leaders in the Republican Party to sweep these reports under the rug and go on with politics as usual. Click the link below to demand they launch an immediate and public investigation into Trump's ties to Russia. Tell Congress: Immediately investigate Trump's ties to Russia () Thank you for speaking out, Tessa Levine, Campaign Manager CREDO Action from Working Assets () Add your name: () References William M. Arkin, Ken Dilanian and Cynthia McFadden, "U.S. Officials: Putin Personally Involved in U.S. Election Hack () ," NBC News, Dec. 15, 2016. Mark Mazzetti and Eric Lichtblau, "C.I.A. Judgment on Russia Built on Swell of Evidence () ," The New York Times, Dec. 11, 2016. Thomas Grove, "Russia Welcomes Idea of Rex Tillerson as Secretary of State () ," The Wall Street Journal, Dec. 12, 2016. Jennifer Steinhauer, "Senate and House Leaders Call for Inquiry of Russian Hacking in Election () ," The New York Times, Dec. 12, 2016. Peter Stone, David Smith, Ben Jacobs, Alec Luhn and Rupert Neate, "Donald Trump and Russia: a web that grows more tangled all the time () ," The Guardian, July 30, 2016. Josh Marshall, "Trump & Putin. Yes, It's Really a Thing () ," TalkingPointsMemo, July 23, 2016. Tom Hamburger, Rosalind Helderman and Michael Birnbaum, "Inside Trump's financial ties to Russia and his unusual flattery of Vladimir Putin. () " The Washington Post, June 17, 2016. Marshall, "Trump & Putin. Yes, It's Really a Thing, () ," TalkingPointsMemo, July 23, 2016 and Abigail Tracy, "Trump's Confusing Answer on Crimea Raises Questions About His Campaign Chairman's Alleged Ties to Russia () ," VanityFair.com, August, 1, 2016. Caitlin Macneal, "Manafort: Trump Still Not Going To Release His Tax Returns () ," TalkingPointsMemo, July 27, 2016. Rogin, "Trump campaign guts GOP's anti-Russia stance on Ukraine () ," The Washington Post, July 18, 2016. body:
There are only 14 days left until the Inauguration. Will you step up? | Friend, This could be yours -- and embossed in your name.
Please activate your 2017 Inaugural Membership by making a one-time contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10. Your membership will forever record the role you played on the first day of our new American government. January 2017 will mark the day that America once again became a country of, for, and by the PEOPLE. And even before I’m officially sworn in as your president, I’m already starting to work for you. We’re starting to bring your jobs back. We’re starting to strengthen our country. We’re starting to make America open for business again. But what you’ve seen so far won’t even come close to what WE will accomplish by working TOGETHER over the next four years. I know you’ll be watching our historic day unfold on January 20, but I hope you’ll also go the extra mile by becoming an Inaugural Member for the 2017 year. Please activate your 2017 Inaugural Membership by making a one-time contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10. Thank you, Donald J. body:
Derek,

A quick update on the 2017 New Hampshire Republican State
Committee Annual Meeting.

The Annual Meeting will be on January 28th at Pinkerton Academy
in Derry.

Registration will begin at 7:30am and the Annual Meeting will
gavel in promptly at 9:00am. Registration will close at 10:00am.

Registration will begin at 7:30am and the Annual Meeting will gavel in promptly at 9:00am. Registration will close at 10:00am. If you would like to run for an officer position please click here ( ). name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Imprisoned for 35 years
body:
Imprisoned for his political opposition 35 years ago, Oscar has become one of the longest serving political prisoners in history.
#
Friends -
When he visited Puerto Rico last May, Bernie called for the release of Oscar Lopez Rivera, a Puerto Rican activist who is serving an unjust sentence.
Oscar was a Puerto Rican nationalist and member of FALN (Armed Forces of National Liberation) who was strongly against the U.S. colonization of Puerto Rico. **Imprisoned for his political opposition 35 years ago, Oscar has become one of the longest serving political prisoners in history. Much of that time has been spent in solitary confinement.**
President Obama has the power before he leaves office to grant Oscar clemency, returning him to his family and home in Puerto Rico. Time is quickly running out and if Oscar is not pardoned by Obama, he will unfairly die in prison.
Our Revolution created a video about Oscar's story, including conversations with his daughter, Clarisa, and elected officials who are joining her in calling for his release.
[**Watch our video to learn about Oscar's story and please share it with your friends and family to spread the word about why it is so important that he be granted clemency.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/share/oscar-lopez-rivera?source=em170105-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/share/oscar-lopez-rivera?source=em170105-full")
Tomorrow, January 6, is an important day in Puerto Rico. Not only is it the birthday of Oscar Lopez Rivera - when he will turn 74 years old - it is also Three Kings Day, an important holiday for Puerto Ricans.
Three Kings Day is a time to exchange gifts, particularly for children. Let's give Oscar's daughter, Clarisa, the gift of having her father back.
[**Watch and share our video so that we can spread the message far and wide that Oscar L opez Rivera must be granted clemency.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/share/oscar-lopez-rivera?source=em170105-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/share/oscar-lopez-rivera?source=em170105-full")
This is as much a human rights issue as it is a criminal justice issue. Thank you for helping get the word out.
In solidarity,
Erika Andiola
Political Outreach Manager
Our Revolution

clean_body: Imprisoned for his political opposition 35 years ago, Oscar has become one of the longest serving political prisoners in history. Friends - When he visited Puerto Rico last May, Bernie called for the release of Oscar Lopez Rivera, a Puerto Rican activist who is serving an unjust sentence. Oscar was a Puerto Rican nationalist and member of FALN (Armed Forces of National Liberation) who was strongly against the U.S. colonization of Puerto Rico. Imprisoned for his political opposition 35 years ago, Oscar has become one of the longest serving political prisoners in history. Much of that time has been spent in solitary confinement. President Obama has the power before he leaves office to grant Oscar clemency, returning him to his family and home in Puerto Rico. Time is quickly running out and if Oscar is not pardoned by Obama, he will unfairly die in prison. Our Revolution created a video about Oscar's story, including conversations with his daughter, Clarisa, and elected officials who are joining her in calling for his release. "" Tomorrow, January 6, is an important day in Puerto Rico. Not only is it the birthday of Oscar Lopez Rivera - when he will turn 74 years old - it is also Three Kings Day, an important holiday for Puerto Ricans. Three Kings Day is a time to exchange gifts, particularly for children. Let's give Oscar's daughter, Clarisa, the gift of having her father back. "" This is as much a human rights issue as it is a criminal justice issue. Thank you for helping get the word out. In solidarity, Erika Andiola Political Outreach Manager Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

body:
this won't take long - but it will help a lot | | **_Bloomberg Politics _Reporter: "Florida Attorney General Pam Bondi will be named to a post in the Trump White House, sources tell me. Trump aides finalizing her role."**

[**Add your name to denounce Bondi and Trump 's pay-to-play record.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3fb/1a5213b3/75b7c50b/718bc31a/2238389189/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/pay-to-play?source=em010517_bondi&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+denounce+Bondi+and+Trum&utm_campaign=em010517_bondi")
---

**FIRST:** Pam Bondi received complaints about fraud at Trump's "University".

**NEXT:** Bondi accepted an illegal $25,OOO campaign donation from Trump for her reelection campaign.

**THEN:** Bondi refused to investigate fraud claims and campaigned across Florida with Trump.

**NOW:** **Reports are coming out that Bondi will have a post in the White House.**

Listen, Pam Bondi clearly put her own self interests ahead of the needs of everyday Floridians. That is why we have to make sure Trump and Bondi know how many of us detest their pay-to-play attitude.

[**That is why we need you to click here and instantly add your name to our petition denouncing Bondi and Trump 's pay-to-play agenda.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3fb/1a5213b3/75b7c50b/718bc315/2238389189/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/pay-to-play?source=em010517_bondi&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+we+need+you+to+click+here+an&utm_campaign=em010517_bondi")

Thanks for all you do,

FlaDems.com
